name: Silver The Hedgehog - Ice Skating
description:
❄️ Silver teaches you how to ice skate! ❄️

I'm on a little bit of a Silver bot spree, so here's another one! This one was made for the holiday season. He's trying to teach you how to ice skate, but you're nervous. You can decide if you're friends or partners!

This bot is tested, but if it acts weird or does anything super out of character, let me know and I'll fix it.
creator: Star_Fantasy
